body: SLS22 S1 checkpoint: Scheduled-Event Gate (SEG) built and compiled clean (0 errors, only the pre-existing sesMap warning). Data pipeline stood up: TUNGSTEN_events.csv seeded now with real researched USD/JPY events through 2026-07-10 (ISM Services PMI, FOMC Minutes Jul 8, Initial Jobless Claims, Balance of Trade, JPY Household Spending/Current Account/PPI -- NFP (Aug 7) and BoJ meeting (Jul 30-31) fall outside the 14-day window this cycle, that's expected not missing); tungsten-events-refresh skill created; TungstenEventsRefresh scheduled task registered (weekly, Mondays 6am, cold-starts a hidden Claude session same pattern as RelayListener). EA-side: OnInit loads the feed, OnTick reloads hourly + updates gate state every tick (cheap) + tightens SL to breakeven-or-better at T-10 before impact-3 events, single integration point in CanTradeNow() checked first per M1.3, tiered impact-3/2/1 windows, fail-open with one WARN per session if feed missing/stale, MarketAwarenessState carries nextEventTime/nextEventImpact/eventGateActive/eventFeedFresh. Post-event ERM-NORMAL interlock deferred to S2 (correctly falls back to fixed T+ windows alone until ERM exists, per directive). Moving to S2 (ERM) now.
